q: How do I reset my password?
a: Go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your email and follow the reset link sent to your inbox.
Withdrawals are processed within 24-48 hours. Ensure your KYC is verified and bank details are correct. Contact support if pending over 48 hours.

q: How do I complete KYC verification?
a: Go to your profile settings and upload a valid government-issued ID and a selfie. KYC is reviewed within 1-3 business days.

q: My deposit has not arrived, what do I do?
a: Deposits typically arrive within 1-3 hours depending on network. Check your transaction hash on the blockchain explorer. Contact support with the transaction ID if not received after 3 hours.

q: How do I connect my wallet?
a: Click 'Connect Wallet' on the platform, choose your wallet provider (e.g. MetaMask), and approve the connection in your wallet popup.
We support BTC, ETH, BNB, ADA, SOL and more against USDT and USDC. See the full list in the Markets tab.

q: How do I report a scam?
a: Do not send any funds. Report the incident immediately using /report in this chat. Our security team will respond within 1 hour.
Trading fees are 0.1% per trade. VIP members receive reduced fees based on monthly volume. See the fee schedule in Account Settings.

q: How do I use the bot?
a: Use /help to see all available commands. For AI chat, use /chat <your question>. For moderation help, use /adminlist to see who can assist you.

q: How do I contact a human moderator?
a: Use /support in this chat to connect with a human moderator. Our team is available 24/7 and will respond as soon as possible.
